title: astroloma humifusum
intro: Astroloma humifusum, also known as the heath pea, is a low-growing, spreading shrub native to Australia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Astroloma humifusum include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis. Herbal preparations of Astroloma humifusum include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
